case_title: TV ESPANOL VS LEVY ELECTRONIC CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY TV ESPANOL AS TO DEFENDANT LEVY ELECTRONIC CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO LEVY ELECTRONIC CENTER, RETURNED MOVED-NON-FORWARDABLE.
